title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises:
Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Guardian Pharmacy International Enterprises!
